title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Murray Hill, Manhattan
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Murray Hill, Manhattan. Safe, humane bat control for homes and buildings. Call for immediate service: $900 – $2,500.
intro: Murray Hill residents and property owners trust Best Pest Control NYC for safe, humane bat removal and exclusion services. Our certified wildlife specialists understand the unique challenges of bat infestations in Murray Hill's historic brownstones, modern high-rises, and commercial buildings. We provide comprehensive bat control solutions that protect your property while ensuring compliance with all NYC wildlife regulations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of bat removal expertise to Murray Hill, with a team trained in humane exclusion methods and building-specific solutions. We offer same-day emergency response, warranty-backed service, and complete attic restoration to ensure your Murray Hill property remains bat-free for years to come.
localContext: Murray Hill's mix of pre-war buildings, rowhouses near Park Avenue, and residential towers creates ideal entry points for bats seeking roosting sites. From properties near the Morgan Library to buildings along tree-lined side streets, our team has successfully handled bat exclusions throughout this historic Manhattan neighborhood while preserving architectural integrity.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Murray Hill typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, the number of entry points, and the complexity of your building's structure. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are bats common in Murray Hill Manhattan buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, bats are found throughout Murray Hill, particularly in older buildings with attics, loose siding, or gaps around rooflines. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks make it attractive to bat populations. Most commonly, we encounter little brown bats and big brown bats in Murray Hill properties.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in NYC humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all NYC and New York State regulations for bat removal, which require humane exclusion methods. We never harm or relocate bats; instead, we use one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave naturally but prevent re-entry. Our methods comply with federal protections for bat species.

faqs.question: How long does the bat exclusion process take in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: The complete bat exclusion process typically takes 2-6 weeks depending on the season and colony size. Initial installation of exclusion devices takes 2-4 hours, followed by a monitoring period to ensure all bats have left. We then seal all entry points and perform cleanup. Emergency situations receive same-day response in Murray Hill.
